name: election-management-system
description: Blockchain-based, IoT-enabled secure election management system

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend/voter-ui && npm install && cd ../observer-dashboard && npm install && cd ../admin-portal && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontends
scripts.build:frontends: cd frontend/voter-ui && npm run build && cd ../observer-dashboard && npm run build && cd ../admin-portal && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:frontend: cd frontend/voter-ui && npm test && cd ../observer-dashboard && npm test && cd ../admin-portal && npm test
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:frontend: cd frontend/voter-ui && npm run lint && cd ../observer-dashboard && npm run lint && cd ../admin-portal && npm run lint
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/*/node_modules dist build

author: Election Management Team
